name: @launchdarkly/agent-skills-evals
description: LLM eval suite for LaunchDarkly agent skills and gram function tools

scripts.eval:create: SKILL_ROOT=$(cd ../skills && pwd) PROVIDER_ROOT=$(pwd)/providers promptfoo eval --config evals/metrics/metric-create.eval.yaml --no-cache --output /tmp/promptfoo-results.json; node print-results.mjs
scripts.eval:choose: SKILL_ROOT=$(cd ../skills && pwd) PROVIDER_ROOT=$(pwd)/providers promptfoo eval --config evals/metrics/metric-choose.eval.yaml --no-cache --output /tmp/promptfoo-results.json; node print-results.mjs
scripts.eval:instrument: SKILL_ROOT=$(cd ../skills && pwd) PROVIDER_ROOT=$(pwd)/providers promptfoo eval --config evals/metrics/metric-instrument.eval.yaml --no-cache --output /tmp/promptfoo-results.json; node print-results.mjs
scripts.eval: npm run eval:create && npm run eval:choose && npm run eval:instrument
